title: lastrea cabrerae
intro: Lastrea cabrerae, also known as the Mexican fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lastrea cabrerae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Lastrea cabrerae can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
